title: Configuration
description:
dprint configuration for tex-fmt.

All keys use camelCase.  Unrecognised keys produce a diagnostic.
Global dprint keys (`lineWidth`, `indentWidth`, `useTabs`) are used as
fallback defaults for `wraplen`, `tabsize`, and `tabchar` respectively.

lists.description: Extra list environments beyond tex-fmt's built-in defaults.

tabchar.description:
Character used for indentation.
Must be `"space"` or `"tab"` (default: `"space"`, or `"tab"` when `useTabs` is set).

tabsize.description: Number of spaces per indent level (default: `2`, or `indentWidth`).

verbatims.description: Extra verbatim environments beyond tex-fmt's built-in defaults.

wrapChars.description: Characters after which lines may be wrapped (each entry must be a single character).

wraplen.description: Maximum line length before wrapping (default: `80`, or `lineWidth`).

wrapmin.description:
Lines longer than this will be wrapped.
Defaults to `wraplen - 10` when `wraplen >= 50`, otherwise `wraplen`.
